Meta.title: HYMEA — The premium experience for your spaces, in Israel
Meta.description: HYMEA brings a French-style premium experience — lounge, concierge, styling, loyalty — that raises the average basket, builds loyalty and broadens the catchment area of shopping centres, businesses and private homes in Israel.
Meta.ogTagline: The premium experience for your spaces, in Israel

meta.title: HYMEA — The office conciergerie
meta.description: HYMEA delivers premium services designed to create a true VIP experience. Explore our worlds — individuals, businesses and shopping centres —, the story of the group and our partnership approach.

hero.title: The HYMEA experience — the services that make a change.
hero.description: HYMEA delivers premium services designed to create a true VIP experience. HYMEA understands your needs and challenges, providing meaningful support that helps you save time. HYMEA — a service with real impact that will deeply transform the overall experience.

history.title: The history of the group.
history.lead: Sandra Bibas Holding is a French group that has built and developed several household-name companies over the past decade. Each entity operates within a highly specialised field — the automotive industry, banking services and other sectors with significant barriers to entry.
principles: Delivering the most comprehensive services possible to customers.
Designing innovative IT solutions to streamline, digitalise and simplify everyday operations.
history.reach: Through its tools, platforms and services, the group improves the daily lives of consumers and businesses alike, serving B2C and B2B markets.

pepites.name: Les pépites Agency
pepites.description: A personal shopping and brand marketing agency: bespoke promotional campaigns, product discovery boxes and tailored customer engagement solutions.

oovoom.name: OOVOOM
oovoom.description: A provider of services, applications and digital tools dedicated to the automotive industry, for drivers and major companies alike (Airbus, Audika, Findus…).

oovoomDriver.name: OOVOOM Driver
oovoomDriver.description: Premium concierge and valet services designed to deliver convenience, efficiency and peace of mind.

maVape.name: Ma Vape Mobile
maVape.description: Bicycle-powered mobile retail stores distributing vaping products directly to consumers, with a unique and engaging experience.

history.emergence: HYMEA emerges in Israel with services tailored to local consumption habits. Embodying the group's expertise, HYMEA offers a premium service to consumers, benefiting companies.

partnership.title: Work with us.
partnership.tagline: The Service, Your Partner, A Strategy.
partnership.description: HYMEA builds lasting partnerships with the places and companies that want to offer an exceptional experience. Let's talk about your project.

hero.eyebrow: The premium experience — French finesse, built for Israel
hero.title: Turn a place people pass through into a destination.
hero.subtitle: HYMEA delivers a premium experience — lounge, concierge, styling, loyalty — that raises the average basket, brings visitors back and broadens the catchment area. The excellence of French hospitality, tailored to Israeli expectations.

leviers.title: Three levers to grow a shopping centre.

spend.title: Raise the average basket
spend.description: A visitor's well-being and time spent on site are the two primary levers of spending. We act on both.

loyalty.title: Bring visitors back
loyalty.description: An engaging experience and a loyalty programme create a sense of belonging — and repeat visits.

catchment.title: Broaden the catchment area
catchment.description: Exclusive services give a real reason to travel further. The place becomes a lifestyle destination.

experience.title: A signature of services that makes people want to stay.
experience.description: One thread runs from the first welcome to the goodbye: care for detail. Every service feeds well-being, dwell time and the desire to return.

lounge.title: The Lounge
lounge.description: An oasis of calm at the heart of the place: complimentary pastry, a warm beverage, a welcoming hostess. The well-being that extends the visit.

handsFree.title: Hands-Free Shopping
handsFree.description: Purchases are collected in-store and handed back at the car or valet stand. Hands free, people browse for longer.

styling.title: Styling
styling.description: Colour analysis, body shape, personalised advice: a stylist who builds trust and can lift spending by up to +70%.

valet.title: Valet & car wash
valet.description: Valet parking and car wash: arrival and departure become a treat, never a chore.

personalShopper.title: Personal Shopper
personalShopper.description: Tailored guidance across the boutiques, for a seamless journey and more confident purchases.

loyalty.title: Loyalty club
loyalty.description: Three tiers — Private, Premium, Prestige — that reward loyalty and build a genuine sense of belonging.

crm.title: Recognition (CRM)
crm.description: A CRM that remembers every visitor: preferences, habits, family. Each visit becomes personal.

events.title: Events & art
events.description: Brand activations, exhibitions, tastings: reasons to come back and moments to share.

results.title: Premium services with measurable commercial impact.
results.description: Studies across luxury retail, department stores and premium outlets: hospitality and personalised services drive spending and loyalty directly.

spend.label: Stylist service can generate a raise of the spending up to 70%.

dwell.label: Dwell time — in the lounge, for example — has an actual impact on sales.

topClients.label: of sales generated by the top 5% highest-spending customers.

loyalty.label: stronger loyalty and repeat visits thanks to a personalised experience.

results.referencesTitle: A concept proven around the world
results.referencesNote: Everywhere, premium services are no longer an add-on: they have become an expected standard, driving spending, loyalty and appeal.

intro.title: One standard of care, three worlds.
intro.description: From the shopping centre to the workplace and the private home: HYMEA delivers a single promise — flawless detail — in the register each place deserves.

shoppingCentres.label: Shopping centres
shoppingCentres.title: The HYMEA concept
shoppingCentres.description: A turnkey premium experience: lounge, valet, hands-free, styling, personal shopper and loyalty club — to raise the basket, build loyalty and make the centre shine.

businesses.label: Businesses
businesses.title: HYMEA Lounge & offices
businesses.description: Offices maintained to the highest standard and a HYMEA Lounge that nurtures your employer brand. Cleanliness becomes an argument — discreet and constant.

individuals.label: Individuals
individuals.title: The art of detail, at home
individuals.description: Homes, vehicles, furniture and textiles entrusted to a team that treats every surface as a rare piece. The comfort of a flawless interior, effortlessly.

meta.title: Shopping centres — the premium experience | HYMEA
meta.description: HYMEA brings its premium concept to shopping centres: lounge, valet, personal shopper, styling and a loyalty club that lift the average basket, build loyalty and broaden the catchment area.

cta.title: Bring the HYMEA experience to your centre.
cta.description: Let us walk you through the concept, the services and the projected impact on your average basket and footfall.
cta.label: Request a presentation

meta.title: Businesses — HYMEA Lounge & premium office upkeep | HYMEA
meta.description: HYMEA elevates the workplace: a HYMEA Lounge and corporate concierge services that strengthen your employer brand, improve well-being and free up valuable working time.

hero.title: HYMEA transforms workplace convenience into a powerful employee experience.
hero.lead: HYMEA is a corporate concierge service designed to enhance employees’ quality of life at work by providing a wide range of convenient services directly within the workplace. Saving time. Reducing stress. Creating value for employees and employers alike.

pillars.title: Four reasons leading employers invest in workplace experience.

talent.title: Attract & retain top talent
talent.description: Workplace experience, well-being and flexibility now weigh heavily in choosing an employer. Premium services strengthen your employer brand and lower turnover.

hrLever.title: An HR lever at a lower price
hrLever.description: Improving the workspace and adding services is far less expensive than salary increases — for a high perceived value.

productivity.title: Engagement & productivity
productivity.description: HYMEA handles the personal errands that would otherwise pull employees away from work — protecting high-value working time.

standards.title: Top-tier standards
standards.description: On-site concierge brings the level of convenience offered by the country's most desirable employers, within reach of every company.

offers.title: Packages that adapt to your space, your budget and your strategy.
offers.description: Most HYMEA services come at little to no cost to the company. Start with the essentials and scale up to a full on-site experience — a different solution to fit your specific strategy.
offers.footnote: An adjustable solution: a different mix for every company.

basic.subtitle: HYMEA services & application
basic.pitch: Included in every package. Most of these services cost the company next to nothing, while boosting its image and productivity.
services: Personal Shopper: groceries, gifts, flowers, clothing & more
HYMEA at-home services: cleaning, plumbing & more

silver.subtitle: HYMEA concierge at your service
silver.pitch: Raise the standard with a unique experience, whatever the space available. A genuinely profitable investment — far below other prestige spending — that immediately lifts the employer brand.
services: Food deliveries received, reheated and served at the desk on a real plate

gold.subtitle: The HYMEA Lounge on-site
gold.pitch: A dedicated space right inside your office — the full HYMEA experience. The prestige offering that drives belonging, productivity and engagement.
services: The Lounge: a true break room

onRequest.subtitle: High-standard services
onRequest.pitch: Your trusted partner takes charge of time-consuming projects such as event planning. Time saved, quality guaranteed.

proof.title: Well-being is a performance lever, not a cost.
proof.description: Investing in the employee experience generates measurable returns in engagement, productivity and attractiveness.

gdp.label: of global GDP is lost every year to low employee engagement.

productivity.label: of employees are more productive when workplace conditions and quality of life improve.

applicants.label: more qualified applicants for organisations with a strong employer brand.

proof.note: Sources: Gallup — State of the Global Workplace 2024; International Workplace Group (IWG) 2024; LinkedIn Talent Solutions.

cta.title: Bring HYMEA inside your offices.
cta.description: A quote or a first visit: we assess your spaces and design the workplace experience that fits your employer strategy.
cta.label: Request a quote

meta.title: Individuals — premium home, vehicle & textile care | HYMEA
meta.description: HYMEA brings high-end cleaning and care to private homes: interiors, vehicles, furniture and textiles treated as rare pieces, with discretion and reliability.

hero.title: The art of detail, at home.
hero.lead: Homes, vehicles, furniture and textiles entrusted to a team that treats every surface as a rare piece. The comfort of a flawless interior, effortlessly and with absolute discretion.

services.title: Four areas of care, one standard of excellence.
services.description: From the living room to the driveway, every intervention follows the same exacting standard.

homes.title: Homes
homes.description: Deep and routine cleaning of living spaces, kitchens and bathrooms — meticulous, discreet, tailored to your home.

vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.description: Interior and exterior detailing that returns your car to showroom condition, at your door.

furniture.title: Furniture
furniture.description: Careful upkeep and restoration of furniture and delicate surfaces, treated as rare pieces.

textiles.title: Textiles
textiles.description: Specialist care for curtains, rugs, upholstery and fine fabrics — cleaned, protected and revived.

diagnosis.title: Tailored assessment
diagnosis.description: We start with your home and your expectations, then design an intervention plan that fits them precisely.

care.title: Care for detail
care.description: Premium products and trained teams that treat every surface — and every belonging — with the utmost care.

discretion.title: Absolute discretion
discretion.description: A trusted team, present and invisible, that respects your home and your privacy at all times.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Punctual, consistent and accountable: the same flawless standard at every single visit.

cta.title: Book your first intervention.
cta.description: Pick a slot that suits you; we get back to you quickly with a tailored proposal — and the welcome offer on your first service.
cta.label: Book a slot

Contact.title: Bring the HYMEA experience to your space.
Contact.description: A presentation, a quote or a first intervention: we get back to you quickly, with a proposal that matches your expectations.
Contact.offerDetail: A welcome offer to experience the HYMEA standard, with no commitment.

meta.title: Book an appointment | HYMEA
meta.description: Book your HYMEA service in four steps: choose the service, share your details, pick a time slot and confirm. One request, a fast and tailored reply.

Rdv.title: Let's set up your appointment.
Rdv.subtitle: Four steps are all it takes: choose your service, leave your details, select a time slot if you wish, then confirm. We get back to you quickly.

type.mallHint: The SEGULA premium experience for your centre. We get in touch for a presentation.
type.entrepriseHint: HYMEA Lounge and office concierge. A quote tailored to your spaces.
type.particulierHint: Premium care for your home. Pick the time slot that suits you.

prestation.error: We couldn't load the services right now. Please try again shortly.
prestation.empty: No service available for this profile at the moment.

fields.placeholderMessage: Tell us about your needs, access constraints or any useful detail.
fields.requiredNote: All fields are required unless marked otherwise.

slot.introRequired: Pick the date and then the time slot that works for you. Availability is updated in real time.
slot.introOptional: You can book a time slot now, or simply ask to be contacted so we can agree on a time together.
slot.contactToggle: I'd rather be contacted to arrange a time.
slot.pickDate: Select a date in the calendar to see the available time slots.
slot.error: We couldn't fetch the slots for this date. Please try again shortly.
slot.empty: No slot available on this date. Try another date.

consent.label: I agree that my data may be processed to handle my request, in accordance with the <policy>privacy policy</policy>.
consent.honeypotLabel: Do not fill in this field.

actions.hintSlot: Choose a time slot to continue.
actions.hintConsent: Tick the consent box to submit your request.

confirmation.title: Your request has been received.
confirmation.body: Thank you! We've received your appointment request and sent you a confirmation e-mail. Our team will get back to you very soon.

errors.rateLimited: Too many requests sent. Please wait a moment before trying again.
errors.generic: Submission failed. Check your details and try again.

meta.title: Legal notice | HYMEA
meta.description: HYMEA legal notice: publisher, hosting, intellectual property and protection of personal data.

sections.heading: Site publisher
sections.body: This website is published by HYMEA. Company name, legal form, share capital, registration number and postal address are provided by the publisher and completed before going live. Contact: contact@hymea.com.

sections.heading: Publication director
sections.body: The publication director is the legal representative of HYMEA. Any request regarding the site's content may be sent to contact@hymea.com.

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.body: The site is hosted on a Dockploy infrastructure connected to the project repository. The host's full details are specified before production deployment.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: All site content — text, the HYMEA logo, visual identity, photographs and layout — is protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction or representation, in whole or in part, without prior written authorisation is prohibited.

sections.heading: Personal data
sections.body: The data entered in the appointment booking form is processed in accordance with our privacy policy, which details the purposes, retention period and your rights of access, rectification and erasure.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: The site sets a single technical cookie storing your language choice (NEXT_LOCALE). No analytics or advertising cookies are used without your consent.

meta.title: Privacy policy | HYMEA
meta.description: HYMEA privacy policy: processing purpose, 12-month retention period and your rights of access, rectification and erasure.

sections.heading: Data controller
sections.body: HYMEA is the controller of the personal data collected through the appointment booking form. For any question about your data, write to contact@hymea.com.

sections.heading: Data collected
sections.body: When you request an appointment, we collect: your first and last name, your e-mail address, your phone number, the desired service type and, for individuals, the intervention address along with optional details (surface area, number of rooms, message). No sensitive data is requested.

sections.heading: Purpose of processing
sections.body: Your data is used solely to handle your appointment request: to contact you back, organise the service and follow up on the relationship. It is never used for unsolicited prospecting nor transferred to third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.heading: Legal basis
sections.body: Processing is based on your explicit consent, collected when the form is submitted (mandatory checkbox). This consent is time-stamped and tied to the version of the text in force (2026-06-v1).

sections.heading: Retention period
sections.body: Your data is kept for a maximum of 12 months from the last contact, then deleted or anonymised, unless a legal obligation requires otherwise.

sections.heading: Recipients
sections.body: Only authorised HYMEA teams access your data. Our technical providers (hosting, transactional e-mail delivery, anti-spam protection) act on instruction and do not use your data for any other purpose.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: In accordance with applicable regulations, you have the following rights over your personal data:
items: Right of access: obtain confirmation that your data is processed and receive a copy of it.
Right to rectification: have inaccurate or incomplete data corrected.
Right to erasure: request the deletion of your data.
Right to object and to withdraw consent, at any time.

sections.heading: Exercising your rights
sections.body: To exercise these rights, send your request to contact@hymea.com. We respond as soon as possible and within one month at the latest.

sections.heading: Anti-spam protection
sections.body: To prevent automated submissions, the form is protected by an anti-bot mechanism (Cloudflare Turnstile) and an invisible honeypot field. These mechanisms do not process data for profiling purposes.

Footer.tagline: The French-style premium experience, tailored to Israel. Care for detail, delivered with discretion.
